pages.text:
LATVIJAS REPUBLIKAS ARLIETU MINISTRIJA

MINISTRY OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS OF THE REPUBLIC OF LATVIA

INSTRUMENT OF RATIFICATION

WHEREAS the Treaty between Norway, The United States of America,

Denmark, France, Italy, Japan, the Netherlands, Great Britain and Ireland and the

British overseas Dominions and Sweden concerning Spitsbergen was done at Paris on the 9"h day of February, in the year 1920,

AND WHEREAS the Republic of Latvia, being a state entitled to become a party to the said Treaty by virtue of Article 10,

NOW THEREFORE, I, Edgars Rinkēvičs, Minister of Foreign Affairs of the

Republic of Latvia declare that the Parliament of the Republic of Latvia, having considered and approved the Treaty between Norway, The United States of

America, Denmark, France, Italy, Japan, the Netherlands, Great Britain and Ireland and the British overseas Dominions and Sweden voncerning Spitsbergen, ratifies the same and undertakes faithfully to perform and carry out the stipulations therein contained.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF I have signed this Instrument of Ratification and affixed the official seal.

DONE at Riga, this/? day of May 2016.

Edloan

Rimenins

ANNAS KEPUEdgars Rinkevičs

Minister of Foreign Affairs
